products.name: IMS™ (Integrated Mission System)
products.descriptor: Lightweight broadband Iridium Certus satellite communications terminal for UAV and AAM

evidence.snippet:
IMS™ Integrated Mission System & Satcom for UAV
===============================================
Gain lightweight broadband urban air mobility (UAM) and unmanned aerial vehicles (UAV) satellite communications, cellular, and Wi-Fi capabilities for mission-critical flight operations.

Lightweight Broadband L-Band Iridium Certus Satcom for Advanced Air Mobility (AAM) and Uncrewed Aircraft
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

products.name: SDL-350™ Series 2

------------------------------
Broadband L-Band Iridium Certus Satellite Data Unit with Onboard Server and Data Acquisition

products.name: ADT-5000™
products.descriptor: Autonomous distress tracking system for ICAO GADSS compliance on commercial aircraft

evidence.snippet:
ADT-5000™ Autonomous Distress Tracking System
=============================================
Autonomously captures aircraft parameters such as position, altitude, and other critical system data to determine distress during flight.

SATISFY 2023 ICAO GADSS RECOMENDATIONS
--------------------------------------
The Premier Solution for Global Aeronautical Distress & Safety System (GADSS) Compliance

products.name: DAL-200™ (Dynamic Air Link)
products.descriptor: Airborne 4G/LTE cellular and Wi-Fi data link for in-flight connectivity and post-flight data offload

evidence.snippet:

============================================================
Extend on-board capabilities with wireless in-flight and post-flight connectivity through multiple network types.

----------------------------------------
Enable In-Flight 4G/LTE Cellular Data and Wi-Fi Connectivity with Post-Flight Automated Data Offloading

====================================================

### ISAT-200A-07™ – NARROWBAND SATCOM

products.name: Sky Connect™ T3A
products.descriptor: Iridium narrowband satellite tracking, voice, and two-way messaging terminal for aircraft fleets

evidence.snippet:
Sky Connect™ Tracking System
============================
Gain reliable global tracking, voice, and text communications for mission-critical fleet operations anywhere in the world.

### Sky Connect™ T3A
Iridium Narrowband Satellite Communications Terminal

products.name: RockAir
products.descriptor: Portable carry-on Iridium satellite and cellular tracking and messaging device for light aircraft and vehicles

evidence.snippet:
RockAIR – Portable Tracking System
==================================
Compact carry-on tracking system for secure aircraft position tracking via Iridium Satcom and cellular communications.

ROCKAIR - PORTABLE TRACKING SYSTEM
----------------------------------
Fleet Tracking & Messaging
--------------------------
The RockAIR is a truly global tracking and messaging device designed for use on the dashboard of light aircraft, rotorcraft, and land-based vehicles. A cost-effective and global method of communicating with your assets, the RockAir ensures safety through location-based tracking anywhere from pole-to-pole.

products.name: MTC-100™ (Multi-Touch Controller)
products.descriptor: Cockpit touchscreen interface for satcom systems with NVIS compliance and mission-critical application support

evidence.snippet:
#### Multi-Touch Controller
(MTC-100)
![](https://www.skytrac.ca/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/Multi-Touch-Control-MTC-100-1-150x150.png)
SKYTRAC’s MTC-100 is a cockpit/cabin interface for air and ground crews. The system includes customizable screens for mission-critical applications and NVIS compliance.

products.name: MMU-II™ (Mission Management Unit II)
products.descriptor: Cockpit voice and messaging control interface with DTMF keypad and PTT for satellite transceivers

evidence.snippet:
Mission Management Unit II™ (MMU-II)
====================================
Get intuitive cockpit access to voice and messaging for mission-critical satellite communication operations.

### MMU-II™ — COCKPIT INTERFACE FOR SATELLITE VOICE AND MESSAGING SYSTEMS
Cockpit Voice and Messaging Interface

products.name: Cockpit Camera (EITS – Eye in the Sky)
products.descriptor: High-definition wide-angle cockpit audio-visual recording camera for instrument panel and pilot view capture

evidence.snippet:
#### Cockpit Camera
(Eye in the Sky)
![](https://www.skytrac.ca/wp-content/uploads/2023/07/Untitled-1_0000s_0001_EITS-Black-150x150.png)
Discreetly record hours of high-resolution cockpit audio-visuals, capturing vivid, smooth, wide-angle cockpit video focused on the instrument panel and the pilot’s view.

Dedicated product pages for MTC-100™ (accessories/cockpit-display-unit-and-dialer) and Cockpit Camera EITS (accessories/cockpit-camera-system) were not fetched; those products were classified from the products index page (resource-0002).

IMS™ product page notes that images shown are 'a conceptualization of our new lightweight Iridium Certus solution offering', though partnership announcements and pricing availability suggest production status.
